Choose one. If you control a commander as you cast this spell, you may choose both modes.
Creatures you control gain flying, vigilance and double strike until end of turn.
Creatures you control gain lifelink, indestructible and protection from all colours until end of turn.

At the beginning of your first main phase, choose one or more —
• Sell Contraband — Create a Treasure token. You lose 1 life.
• Buy Information — Draw a card. You lose 2 life.
• Hire a Mercenary — Create a 3/2 colorless Shapeshifter creature token with changeling. You lose 3 life. [i](It is every creature type.)[/i]

Enchant creature you control
When enchanted creature deals combat damage to a player, sacrifice it and attach this Aura to a creature you control. If you do, untap all creatures you control and after this phase, there is an additional combat phase.

cards.flavor_text: [i]Relentless, bloodthirsty lizards Mundus created to assault the human world.[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Flash, haste
This creature has hexproof and first strike if it entered this turn.
cards.flavor_text: [i]This sucker uses raw demonic power to do little space-time jumps. It'll warp right next to you and bite your face off before you can blink! Hope you got quick reflexes.[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Squad {2}
Exalted [i](Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, that creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.)[/i]
cards.flavor_text: [i]They don't walk — they teleport, and they'll hang back from a fight only to jump in while you're dealing with something else.[/i]

cards.rules_text: When this creature dies, it deals damage to each creature equal to its toughness.
cards.flavor_text: [i]Watch out! Take these guys out at range and they'll blast their allies, but let them get close and you're in for a world of hurt.[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Lifelink
{2}{B}, sacrifice a creature: Return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Put X +1/+1 counters on it, where X is the sacrificed creature's mana value.

[i]Overcommit — [/i]Whenever a creature deals damage to you, goad it until the end of its controller's next turn.
[i]Reposition — [/i]Sacrifice this enchantment during the declare blockers step: Choose an attacking creature. For any number of creatures the defending player controls, that creature either blocks it or stops blocking it. [i](The new blocks don't have to be legal. If you remove all blockers from a blocked creature, it's still “blocked.”)[/i]

[i]Swords Formation — [/i]Equipped creature has double strike, menace, and “Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.”
Equip {4}. This ability costs {3} less to activate if the creature it targets was dealt damage this turn.
cards.flavor_text: [i]“The demonic power was activated in me once, when Vergil lovingly jammed this through my chest.”[/i]

cards.rules_text: [i]Duelist — [/i]Whenever a creature you control attacks a player, if no other creature is attacking that player, put a +1/+1 counter on it and it can't be blocked by nonlegendary creatures until end of turn.
cards.flavor_text: [i]“A man with guts and honor, I like that! It's a shame you serve Mundus!”[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Vigilance, first strike
[i]Devil Arm[/i] — When Beowulf dies, exile it. While it's exiled, you may cast its other face.
cards.flavor_text: [i]“It's the stench of betrayal, the odor of that accursed Sparda! I will annihilate every last blood relation of Sparda!”[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Deathtouch
[i]AT Rifle[/i] — Whenever Beryl deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice another nonland permanent. If you do, draw two cards and each opponent loses life equal to the mana value of the sacrificed permanent.

cards.flavor_text: [i]A magic golden stone made through a secret process. It can restore lost souls.[/i]

cards.rules_text:
[i]Vengeful Hatred[/i] — Whenever Mary attacks, each opponent loses X life, where X is the number of other attacking creatures.
[i]Prioritize the Mission[/i] — {2}, Sacrifice another creature: You gain 2 life and draw a card.
cards.flavor_text: [i]“I know better than to trust the words of a demon, but after everything that's happened, maybe I don't.”[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Flying
[i]Elite Forces[/i] — Whenever another creature you control enters, Baines gets +1/+0 until end of turn.
[i]Born-Again — [/i]Whenever Baines attacks, exile up to one target creature you own, then return it to the battlefield under your control tapped and attacking.
cards.flavor_text: [i]“I was saved by God. Let's see if your Devil's gonna help you too.”[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Deathtouch, haste
When this creature enters, exile up to one other target creature you control until this creature leaves the battlefield.
Whenever this creature attacks, for each opponent, create a tapped token that's a copy of the exiled card attacking that opponent. At the beginning of your next end step, sacrifice those tokens.

Blitz {3}{R} [i](If you cast this spell for its blitz cost, it gains haste and “When this creature dies, draw a card”. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.)[/i]
When this creature leaves the battlefield, it deals damage equal to its power to any target.

Choose up to five ★ worth of modes. You may choose the same mode more than once.
★ — Each player sacrifices a creature of their choice.
★★ — Draw a card for each creature that died under your control this turn.
★★★ — Each opponent loses X life, where X is the number of creature cards in your graveyard.

Flying
[i]Flock Off — [/i]Whenever a nontoken creature you control deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice it. If you do, draw that many cards.
cards.flavor_text: [i]“Griffon, you have failed me. You are no longer worthy!”[/i]

cards.rules_text: Whenever a player attacks with three or more creatures, draw a card.
cards.flavor_text: [i]“You and I see things differently. Seeing things differently can open new paths.”[/i]

23 of them did.[/i]

Stylish [i](Your rank starts at D.)[/i]
Flip a coin. Exile target nonland permanent you control. For each opponent, exile up to one target nonland permanent they control.

cards.flavor_text: [i]“Leave it to fate. Heads, I go. Tails, you go.”[/i]
cards.notes:
New

The coin flip does nothing. Dante's coin was heads on both sides.

cards.flavor_text: [i]“What a ‘big' surprise... I hope for your sake you have something inside that big body of yours.”[/i]

Whenever you attack, if you're the monarch, you may put a Demon or Devil creature card from your hand onto the battlefield tapped and attacking. At the beginning of the next end step, sacrifice it.
